sections.overview: Centered page title and brand promise tagline

sections.overview: Featured commerce teaser with image on right and text/CTAs on left - 'Beyond the Furniture' section

sections.overview: Two-column grid of linked image cards - delivery and planning tool

contentSequences.description: Grid of 2 items side-by-side, each with a large image and a linked heading below it (Top Drawer Delivery, 3D Room Planning Tool) - card-style teasers with no description text

sections.overview: Featured commerce teaser with text/CTAs on left and image on right - 'Design & Inspiration' section

contentSequences.description: Large promotional teaser with text content on the left side (H3 heading 'Design & Inspiration', descriptive paragraph, three CTA links: Furniture Customization, 3D Room Planning, Decorating Tips) and lifestyle image on the right

sections.overview: Two-column grid of linked image cards - design service and furniture care

contentSequences.description: Grid of 2 items side-by-side, each with a large image and a linked heading below it (Free Design Service, Furniture Care) - card-style teasers with no description text

sections.overview: Long-form guarantee text paragraph with inline links

contentSequences.description: Bold 'Our Regret-Free Guarantee' lead-in followed by a long paragraph of body text containing multiple inline hyperlinks to various service pages (quality craftsmanship, design service, 3D room planner, furniture care, financing, delivery, store locations)
